create.title: Create Character
create.featChoicesHint: These picks come from your origin feat(s): {{feats}}. Choose their cantrips, spells, skills, or tools here; they are independent of your class.
create.hintClass: Your class determines your role, abilities, and hit points.
create.hintRace: Your species gives you special traits and affects your speed.
create.hintBackground: Your background gives you skill proficiencies and an <g>origin feat</g>.
create.hintAbilities: Assign your ability scores. Use <g>Point Buy</g> for fair distribution.
create.hintReview: Everything looks good? Create your character!
create.tip_fighter: Great for beginners. Second Wind heals you in a pinch, Action Surge gives an extra turn burst.
create.tip_barbarian: Simple and powerful. Just Rage and attack. Unarmored Defense = good AC without armor.
create.tip_rogue: Sneak Attack makes every hit hurt. Cunning Action gives bonus Dash/Disengage every turn.
create.tip_wizard: Huge spell list but limited slots. Needs Intelligence. Prepare different spells each day.
create.tip_cleric: Heals allies and fights. Choose a Domain at level 1; it completely changes your playstyle.
create.tip_bard: Jack of all trades. Bardic Inspiration helps allies. Great at skills and social encounters.
create.tip_druid: Wild Shape at level 2. Powerful but complex: a different animal form for every situation.
create.tip_paladin: Smite with spell slots for huge burst damage. Lay on Hands is a reliable heal pool.
create.tip_ranger: Hunter's Mark adds damage every turn. Good at ranged combat and tracking enemies.
create.tip_sorcerer: Fewer spells known than Wizard but Metamagic lets you modify how spells work.
create.tip_warlock: Pact Magic slots refresh on Short Rest. Eldritch Blast is your reliable damage cantrip.
create.tip_monk: Focus Points fuel special abilities. Stunning Strike can shut down enemies for a full round.
create.tip_artificer: Infuses items with magic. Can heal with Infused Weapons. Very versatile support.
create.hintBgAsi: Your background gives you ability score increases. Choose +2 to one and +1 to another, or +1 to three different abilities.
create.bgAsiSelectFirst: Tap an ability to assign your +2 bonus.
create.bgAsiSelectSecond: Now tap another ability to assign your +1 bonus.
create.bgAsiSelect3: Tap up to three abilities to assign +1 each.
create.humanVersatileHint: Humans gain a second Origin feat from the Versatile trait. Choose one to complement your background feat.
create.hintSkills: Pick your skill proficiencies. Your background grants some for free; choose the rest from your class list.
create.skillsClass: Choose {{count}} more from your class list
create.hintSpells:
Choose your starting spells. Cantrips are permanent;

prepared spells

can be changed after a long rest.
create.noSpellsAtLevel: This class doesn't have spellcasting at this level. You can skip this step.
create.leaveMessage: You haven't finished creating this character. If you leave now, your progress is lost.
create.hintEquipment: Your class and background each grant a starting-equipment package. For each, choose the gear option or take the gold-only alternative; you can edit everything after creation.
create.noEquipment: No starting equipment to choose. You can add gear after creation.
create.equipToolChoice_artisan-or-instrument: Artisan's Tools or Musical Instrument of your choice
create.hpAverageHint: Level 1: d{{hitDie}} max ({{hitDie}}). Levels 2+: d{{hitDie}} avg ({{avg}}) + CON mod per level.
create.hpRolledHint: Enter your total HP after rolling d{{hitDie}} per level (level 1 always gets max die).
